concept.title: Copying files with undefined format
concept.shortdesc: Restrictions apply when you copy files with undefined format.

conbody.p:
Files with undefined format (RECFM=U) cannot be copied in . This restriction applies to the following cases:
Copying a file with RECFM=U from one remote system to another
Copying a remote file with RECFM=U to a local file
Copying a local file to a remote file with RECFM=U
Copying a remote file with RECFM=U to a remote file with RECFM=F
Copying a remote file with RECFM=F to a remote file with RECFM=U
